title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Marco, Unknown person #14, Straw Hat Pirates, Luffy, King as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....About a certain fire conjuring race that lived on top of the red line...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have been working on the same day for a while now and I have a few more of the most important things to do with the same things.

dialogue.speaker: Marco
dialogue.text: You Whitebeard Pirates should accept death already!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aah... I give!! this is more than enough for me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's time for the stars to take the stage!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey, curly brows, if we win this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I know, it'll finally be in sight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Luffy becoming King of the Pirates!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
